positive: Minimalist, stylized illustration of a soaring celestial fox spirit (Kitsune), composed within a perfect circle. The fox should have elegant, flowing tails and translucent features, radiating divine light. It is surrounded by delicate bioluminescent floral elements and constellations. Style: Japanese ukiyo-e meets modern tattoo art, rendered in highly contrasting black linework and vibrant iridescent teal and gold foil accents. Focus on clean silhouettes and strong geometric symmetry. Composition: Central, portrait orientation. Lighting: Dramatic rim lighting, volumetric fog effect. Print-friendly details: Vector quality, isolated subject on a solid off-white background, suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: jpeg artifacts, blurry, lowres, noisy, watermark, signature, text, logo, trademark, copyright, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn hands, mutated, disfigured, grain, gradient, flat color, bokeh, clutter
